zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith von Bayern於1100年5月19日出生在德國貝也時，她的父親Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen25歲，母親Wulfhilde von Sachsen25歲。她於1120年與Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1130年8月27日在德國享年30歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音洛其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith von Bayern于1100年5月19日出生在德国貝也时，她的父亲Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen25岁，母亲Wulfhilde von Sachsen25岁。她于1120年与Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1130年8月27日在德国享年30岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音洛其。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of   Bayer  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith von Bayern was born on 19 May 1100, in Bavaria, Germany, her father, Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, was 25 and her mother, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, was 25. She married Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben in 1120. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 27 August 1130, in Germany, at the age of 30, and was buried in Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith von Bayern est née le 19 mai 1100, à Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben en 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 août 1130, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith von Bayern am 19. Mai 1100 in Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen 25 und ihre Mutter Wulfhilde von Sachsen 25. Sie hat 1120 Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. August 1130 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Deutschland und wurde in Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Bayern è nata il il 19 maggio 1100 nel Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben nel 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 agosto 1130, nel Germania, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith von Bayernが1100年5月19日にドイツバイエルンで生まれた時，父Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzenは25歳，母Wulfhilde von Sachsenは25歳であった。1120年にFriedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwabenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1130年8月27日にドイツで30歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチエルズビストゥム メインズロルチにて埋葬された。

ko.Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empir: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 로르치
ko.lifeSummary: Judith von Bayern(이)가 1100년 5월 19일 독일 베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wulfhilde von Sachsen(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1120년 Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 8월 27일 독일에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 로르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Bayern nasceu em 19 de maio de 1100, em Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben em 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1130, em Alemanha, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith von Bayern родилась 19 мая 1100 г. в местности беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Wulfhilde von Sachsen, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben в 1120 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 августа 1130 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности лорх, эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith von Bayern nació el 19 de mayo de 1100, en Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich IX. Herzog von Bayern dem Schwarzen, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Wulfhilde von Sachsen, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben en 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1130, en Alemania, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Lorch, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
